package rulefixtures

import (
	"strconv"
)

// scenario for fmt_sprintf_single_string_passthrough: `fmt.Sprintf("%s", s)` instead of returning or writing the string directly.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: info.
func scenario497Negative(values []int) []string {
	out := make([]string, 0, len(values))
	for _, value := range values {
		out = append(out, strconv.Itoa(value))
	}
	return out
}
